toggle.savedDescription: We saved your preference for next time.

login.title: Driver OT Worksheet
login.description: Sign in to reconcile this week's punches.

register.title: Create First Admin
register.description: No accounts exist yet. The first account becomes the admin.
register.inviteRequiredDescription: KFI Dispatch is invite-only. Ask an admin to send you an invite link.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.submittedBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a reset link shortly. The link expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link has expired, been used, or never existed.

acceptInvite.title: Accept Invite
acceptInvite.invalidDescription: This invite link has expired, been used, or never existed. Ask an admin to send a fresh one.

weekSummary.noData: No Connecteam data yet for this week.
weekSummary.noActiveDrivers: No active drivers found for this week.
weekSummary.refreshIssuesUnresolved_one: {{count}} Connecteam user with shifts but no KFI driver:
weekSummary.refreshIssuesUnresolved_other: {{count}} Connecteam users with shifts but no KFI driver:
weekSummary.refreshIssuesMapLink: Map them on the Connecteam aliases page →
weekSummary.resetDialogDesc: This is a destructive admin action. Choose what to wipe, then type the week start date below to confirm. Every deleted punch is still recorded in the deletion audit log, so this remains attributable.
weekSummary.resetScopePunchesDesc: Delete every driver + customer + manual punch for this week. Review status and notes are preserved.
weekSummary.resetScopeReviewedDesc: Also clear every "reviewed" mark for this week.
weekSummary.resetScopeAllDesc: Also hide every note, clear customer-upload history, wipe Connecteam parity baselines, and unmark the week as refreshed.

driverDetail.resetCustomerDesc: Hard-delete every Customer-source punch for this driver this week, so you can fix a mis-mapped roster name and re-upload the customer file. Connecteam (Driver-source) punches are left untouched.
driverDetail.resetCustomerToastDesc: Deleted {{count}} customer punches for KFI {{kfi}}. You can re-upload the customer file now.
driverDetail.resetCustomerLockedDesc: Unlock this driver-week before resetting customer punches.
driverDetail.removeConnecteamDesc: Hard-delete every Connecteam-imported punch for this driver this week (including any you've edited inline) so you can pull a clean set from Connecteam. Manual driver entries and Customer-source punches are left untouched.
driverDetail.removeConnecteamToastDesc: Deleted {{count}} Connecteam punches for KFI {{kfi}}. You can refresh from Connecteam now.
driverDetail.removeConnecteamLockedDesc: Unlock this driver-week before removing Connecteam time.
driverDetail.lockedBanner: This driver-week is locked{{by}}{{at}}. Punches, refreshes, and customer-file uploads are blocked until it's unlocked.
driverDetail.deletePunchConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this punch?
driverDetail.lockedAction: Driver-week is locked. Unlock it to make changes.

toasts.allReviewed: All drivers reviewed for this week
toasts.validationRequiredFields: Date, Clock In, and Clock Out are required.
toasts.validationPickCustomer: Pick a customer for a Customer-source punch.

punchTable.resetDayTitle: Reset this day back to the engine-derived total
punchTable.addNotePlaceholder: Add a note about this punch…

displayTz.title: Display timezone — click to change override, re-pull, or shift existing punches.
displayTz.label: Display timezone

driverDetail.noConnecteamBaselineTitle: No Connecteam baseline yet — refresh from Connecteam to enable parity comparison.
driverDetail.flaggedTitle: Punches flagged for review on this driver-week
driverDetail.lockedToastDesc: A supervisor has locked this driver-week. Unlock it to make changes.
driverDetail.hideNoteConfirm: Hide this note? The row is preserved for audit.
driverDetail.previewNotReadyDesc: Wait for the preview to load before saving.
driverDetail.resetDayConfirm: Reset {{date}} back to the engine-derived total? Each punch's hours will be recomputed from its clock-in / clock-out.
driverDetail.noPunches: No punches recorded for this week.
driverDetail.dayOverriddenTitle: Day total overridden{{by}}{{on}} — click to re-edit
driverDetail.dayClickToSet: Click to set this day's total — punches will be scaled proportionally
driverDetail.punchHoursClickToEdit: Click to edit this punch's hours — won't change clock in/out or any other punch
driverDetail.flaggedClear: Flagged for review — click to clear

tz.savingHelp: Save: update the driver default AND restamp this week's Driver-source punches to the new tz (one click — no extra shift needed). Re-pull Connecteam: throw away this week's Driver-source punches and pull fresh from Connecteam (use after a clock_offsets fix). Shift existing: add Xh to every punch already stored — for one-off off-by-one fixes.
tz.invalidShiftDesc: Enter a non-zero number of hours (e.g. 1 or -1).
tz.customerMismatchTitle: {{customer}} feed is landing in {{tz}} (driver default {{driverTz}}). Click to save a customer default or shift existing punches.
tz.customerSavingHelp: Saving updates only future uploads for this customer. Use "Shift existing" below to fix the punches already on this week.

manualPunchDialog.description: Adds a new punch alongside the driver's existing entries. It never overwrites or replaces a Connecteam or customer-file punch — both will count toward the day. Manual punches are also preserved across the next Connecteam refresh.
manualPunchDialog.timeHelp: Format as "H:MM AM/PM" (e.g. "8:00 AM"). The date is stored in this driver's display timezone, so what you see here is what payroll sees.

ct.parityStaleTitle: Dashboard matches the snapshot, but the snapshot is {{age}} old — Connecteam may have logged new shifts since.{{refreshedNote}} Re-pull Connecteam to recheck.
ct.parityMatchTitle: Every day's dashboard total reconciles to the Connecteam baseline within 0.005h.{{refreshedNote}}
ct.baselineStaleNote: Baseline is {{age}} old — refresh to recheck.

previewPanel.fillIn: Fill in date, clock in, and clock out to preview the impact on this driver's day and week.
previewPanel.overlapHelp: Saving will keep both — review the times below to make sure that's intentional.

shortcutsList.autoAdvanceLabel: Jump to next unreviewed after marking reviewed
shortcutsList.celebrationSoundLabel: Play a chime when the week is fully reviewed
shortcutsList.note: Shortcuts are ignored while typing in a field or while a dialog is open.

driversSidebar.heading: Drivers by Customer
driversSidebar.rowTitle: Click bubble to review · click name to open · double-click row to review

empty.noDriversInstructions: No drivers loaded. Click "Refresh Connecteam" to pull this week.
empty.noMatch: No drivers match the current filters.

bubble.markedBadInfo: Marked bad — clear from driver page

toast.clearedOverrideDesc: Driver is back under their Connecteam roster customer.
toast.allReviewed: All drivers reviewed for this week

allReviewedSplash.message: All drivers reviewed for this week
allReviewedSplash.fullyReadySub: Every driver reviewed and zero outstanding alerts. Go home.

hiddenNotes.compactTitle_one: {{count}} note hidden since you last checked
hiddenNotes.compactTitle_other: {{count}} notes hidden since you last checked

zenopleExport.buttonTitle: Download the Zenople xlsx for this week (admin)
zenopleExport.readinessDesc: {{ready}} of {{total}} drivers are ready. Fix the items below and try again.

adminUsers.title: Admin · Users & Invites
adminUsers.smtpWarning: SMTP is not configured. Email-sending actions will fail.
adminUsers.shareLink: Share this link with the new dispatcher (valid for 7 days):
adminUsers.resendCooldown: You can resend this invite in {{seconds}}s
adminUsers.resendTitle: Re-email this invite link to the recipient

toasts.resendInviteNotConfiguredDesc: Ask the admin to connect SendGrid via Replit integrations. Copy the link instead.
toasts.sendResetNotConfiguredDesc: Ask the admin to connect SendGrid via Replit integrations, or use Generate link instead.

validation.enterIp: Enter an IP address or CIDR range.
validation.invalidIp: That doesn't look like a valid IP (e.g. 203.0.113.7) or CIDR range (e.g. 203.0.113.0/24).

adminUsers.emailNotConnectedAfter: be emailed — you'll need to copy and share the links manually. Connect SendGrid from the Replit integrations panel to enable email delivery.
adminUsers.suggestedBlocksDesc_one: {{count}} IP has hit the lockout threshold 3+ times in the past 24 hours and aren't blocklisted yet.
adminUsers.suggestedBlocksDesc_other: {{count}} IPs have hit the lockout threshold 3+ times in the past 24 hours and aren't blocklisted yet.
adminUsers.addIpToBlocklistTitle: Add this IP to the blocklist
adminUsers.hideSuggestionTitle: Hide this suggestion until the IP triggers another lockout
adminUsers.bucketsDesc: Active rate-limit buckets (failed sign-ins, password-reset abuse, token guessing). Rows in red are currently blocked. Use the unlock button to clear a lockout for a specific account or IP.
adminUsers.noBuckets: No active rate-limit buckets. Sign-ins and password-reset traffic look normal.
adminUsers.lockoutTableDesc: Each row is a (limiter, key) pair that has hit its threshold at least once in the selected window. Use the count to spot repeat offenders worth blocklisting at the network edge. Widen the window to spot slow brute-force campaigns.
adminUsers.noLockoutsOnDay: No lockouts active on the selected day.
adminUsers.noLockoutsRecent: No lockouts in the past 7 days.
adminUsers.noLockoutsToChart: No lockouts in the past {{days}} days — nothing to chart.
adminUsers.chartTip: Tip: click a bar to filter the table below to lockouts active on that day.
adminUsers.ipBlocklistDescBefore: Requests matching these addresses get a 403 before they reach the rate limiter. Entries can be a single IP (e.g.
adminUsers.ipBlocklistDescAfter: ) to cover a whole subnet. Use the Block button on a row above, or add one directly below — useful when an alert from another tool flags an IP before it hits our own lockouts.
adminUsers.reasonDialogPlaceholder: Saved with the entry for later context
adminUsers.cidrRangeTitle: CIDR range — blocks every address in this subnet
adminUsers.removeFromBlocklistTitle: Remove this IP from the blocklist
adminUsers.clocksDesc: Every time-clock discovered in the Connecteam account. Refresh pulls all of them dynamically — shift counts below come from the most recent refresh.
adminUsers.staleStatsDesc: These clocks previously refreshed but no longer exist in the Connecteam account.
adminUsers.resetLinkBanner: Password reset link for {{email}} (valid for 1 hour):
adminUsers.digestOptInTitle: Receive the daily email summarising notes that were hidden in the last 24 hours.
adminUsers.sendResetCooldownTitle: You can send another reset email in {{seconds}}s
adminUsers.sendResetTitle: Email a password-reset link to this user
adminUsers.noHistoryFor: No admin actions recorded for {{email}} yet.

adminI18n.title: Admin · Translation status
adminI18n.description: Keys present in one locale but missing in another fall back to English at runtime. Add a translation in the corresponding bundle to clear the warning.
adminI18n.noMissing: No missing keys for this locale.
adminI18n.machineDescription: These Spanish strings were drafted by a machine and need a native-speaker review before payroll season.

adminDeletedNotes.title: Admin · Hidden notes
adminDeletedNotes.description: Notes hidden by an admin via the driver-detail page. The row stays in the database for audit. Restoring clears the hide so the note shows up live on the driver-detail page again. Both the hide and the restore are recorded in the user audit log.
adminDeletedNotes.empty: No hidden notes. When an admin hides a note from the driver-detail page, it'll appear here so it can be restored.
adminDeletedNotes.restoredDescription: Note for {{kfiId}} (week of {{week}}) is visible to dispatchers again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

moveDriverDialog.title: Move driver to a different customer
moveDriverDialog.descriptionAfter: (from Connecteam). Choose a different customer to override that grouping on the dashboard. The override survives Connecteam refreshes.
moveDriverDialog.movedDesc: Override saved. It will survive Connecteam refreshes until cleared.

adminDeletedNotesExtra.description: Notes hidden by an admin via the driver-detail page. The row stays in the database for audit. Restoring clears the hide so the note shows up live on the driver-detail page again. Both the hide and the restore are recorded in the user audit log.
adminDeletedNotesExtra.emptyState: No hidden notes. When an admin hides a note from the driver-detail page, it'll appear here so it can be restored.
adminDeletedNotesExtra.restoredDesc: Note for {{kfiId}} (week of {{week}}) is visible to dispatchers again.

adminOverrides.title: Driver customer overrides
adminOverrides.description: A per-driver override re-groups that driver under a different customer on the week dashboard. Overrides survive Connecteam refreshes; the original roster customer is preserved on the driver record so this page can show it side-by-side. Use the "⋯" menu on any driver row in the sidebar to set or clear an override.
adminOverrides.empty: No driver customer overrides. Open any week and use the row menu on a driver in the sidebar to move them.
adminOverrides.clearedDesc: Driver is back under their Connecteam roster customer.

adminInactive.title: Inactive customers
adminInactive.description: Inactive customers are hidden from the per-week customer files panel and all upload routes reject files for them with a clear error. Historical punches, upload attempts, aliases, and AI samples are preserved — reactivating brings the row back exactly as it was.
adminInactive.empty: No inactive customers. Use the row menu (⋯) on the week dashboard's customer files panel to mark a customer inactive.
adminInactive.reactivatedDesc: The row is back on the per-week customer files panel and uploads are accepted again.

adminTimezones.title: Timezones
adminTimezones.customerHelp: When uploading a customer file, the parser stamps each row in this timezone unless the dispatcher picks a per-upload override or a driver has their own override.
adminTimezones.noPrefsBefore: No customer preferences yet. Customers without a preference use
adminTimezones.driverHelp: A driver's override wins over the customer preference and the system default. Use "(default)" to clear and fall back to the customer / system default.
adminTimezones.driverEmpty: No drivers loaded for the current week yet.

adminAiExtra.descriptionPart1: Original files uploaded through the "New customer file…" flow are stashed here so engineers can grab a fixture when promoting a customer to a deterministic parser. Unconfirmed samples expire after 24 hours; confirmed samples are kept for 90 days. Pin a sample to keep it indefinitely. See
adminAiExtra.noSamples: No stashed AI samples. They appear here after a dispatcher uses the "New customer file…" flow.
adminAiExtra.unpinTitle: Unpin: allow this sample to expire on its normal schedule
adminAiExtra.pinTitle: Pin: keep this sample even after the TTL
adminAiExtra.deleteConfirm:
Delete this stashed AI sample?

{{fileName}}
({{customer}}, week {{week}})

This cannot be undone.
adminAiExtra.pinnedDesc: This sample is exempt from the TTL cleanup.
adminAiExtra.unpinnedDesc: This sample will expire on its normal schedule.
adminAiExtra.historyDesc: Append-only log of admin deletes from this page.
adminAiExtra.historyDescFiltered: Append-only log of admin deletes from this page. Filtered to {{customer}}.
adminAiExtra.noHistory: No AI sample deletions recorded yet.
adminAiExtra.noHistoryFiltered: No AI sample deletions recorded for "{{customer}}" yet.

adminConnecteamAliases.title: Connecteam user aliases
adminConnecteamAliases.addDescPart2: to an existing KFI driver. Use this when the same driver shows up on more than one time-clock under different Connecteam ids — refresh will merge their punches into the single KFI driver. Saved rows take effect on the next refresh; they override the static
adminConnecteamAliases.emptyAliases: No aliases yet. Add one above whenever a refresh surfaces an unresolved Connecteam user id.
adminConnecteamAliases.cannotDeleteSeededDesc: This entry comes from the USER_ID_ALIASES_LD static seed in code. Override it by saving a new mapping for the same Connecteam user id.

adminCustomerAliasesExtra.description: Every (customer, name-on-doc) → driver mapping the "New customer file" flow has remembered. Re-map a row when a dispatcher made a wrong call, or forget it to let the next upload re-decide. Forgetting only removes the saved decision — it doesn't touch any imported punches.
adminCustomerAliasesExtra.empty: No aliases saved yet. They'll appear here as dispatchers confirm new customer files.
adminCustomerAliasesExtra.historyDesc: Append-only log of every alias re-map and forget. Use this to trace which admin (or dispatcher) changed a mapping when a dispatcher's punches start landing on the wrong driver.

adminDriverIdsExtra.addDescription: Map a customer payroll id (TELD code, badge #, employee number, etc.) to a KFI driver. New mappings take effect on the next customer-file upload — no code change needed. To override a stale built-in mapping, just enter the same id; the saved row wins.
adminDriverIdsExtra.sampleNamePlaceholder: As it appeared in the file
adminDriverIdsExtra.empty: No saved mappings yet. Add one above whenever a customer file surfaces an unknown payroll id.
adminDriverIdsExtra.ignoreDescription: Per-customer ids dispatchers marked as "not a driver" from the upload preview. Future uploads silently drop these ids instead of nagging. Delete a row here to start surfacing it again on the next upload.
adminDriverIdsExtra.ignoreEmpty: No ignore rules yet. Dispatchers can add them from the upload preview's unmapped-ids picker.
adminDriverIdsExtra.ignoreLiftedDesc: {{label}} will surface in the next upload preview.

customerUpload.hidDesc: Existing punches and uploads are kept. Reactivate from Admin · Inactive customers to bring it back.
customerUpload.errorAiTimeout: The AI reader took longer than the maximum allowed and was canceled. Try the original spreadsheet (much faster than a scan), or retry in a moment.
customerUpload.errorAiInvalidJson: AI couldn't read this file end-to-end. Try uploading the original spreadsheet or a clearer scan, then re-try.
customerUpload.errorAiGeneric: AI couldn't read this file. Try a clearer scan or the original export, then re-try.
customerUpload.alreadyImportedDesc: These bytes match the file you already confirmed for this week, so the existing rows were kept. Edit the file and re-upload, or use Re-upload to force a fresh preview.
customerUpload.uploadedWithUnknownDesc: Imported {{count}} punches. These IDs aren't in the KFI roster, so their rows were skipped: {{ids}}. Add them to the driver mapping if they're new hires.
customerUpload.skippedUnsupportedDesc: Only .xlsx, .xls, .csv, .pdf, and image files (JPG, PNG, HEIC, WEBP) are accepted. Skipped: {{names}}.
customerUpload.dropSingleTitle: Drop a single file per customer
customerUpload.dropSingleDesc: Per-row upload accepts one file at a time. Use the panel-wide drop zone to bulk-upload {{count}} files.
customerUpload.unsupportedFileDesc: Only .xlsx, .xls, .csv, .pdf, and image files (JPG, PNG, HEIC, WEBP) are accepted. "{{name}}" was skipped.
customerUpload.bulkBusyDesc: Wait for the current bulk upload to finish before dropping more files.
customerUpload.panelDescription: Each customer's weekly export. Re-uploading replaces only that customer's imported rows; manual punches are kept.
customerUpload.tzTitle: Override the timezone applied to the next upload. 'Auto' uses the driver / customer / system default.
customerUpload.folderTitle: Pick a whole folder; all .xlsx, .pdf, and image files inside are uploaded.
customerUpload.formatDriftHint: Probably a format change — open the file directly and compare it against the last working upload before retrying.
customerUpload.notKnownCustomer: Not a known customer — use the new-customer flow to map it.
customerUpload.staleErrorTitle: This error is from an earlier attempt and may no longer reflect the current state. Re-upload to refresh.
customerUpload.latestFileImportedTitle: Your most recent upload for this customer was identical to the file already imported, so it was skipped. Use Re-upload to force a fresh import anyway.
customerUpload.aiBadgeTitle: AI-imported. {{aliases}} saved driver alias(es). Click to view stashed samples.
customerUpload.noUploadYet: No upload yet for this week
customerUpload.mapIdsAdmin: Click an id to add a driver mapping.
customerUpload.mapIdsUser: Ask an admin to add the missing driver mapping.
customerUpload.readingHint: First-time AI read can take a few minutes — next upload of this format will be instant.
customerUpload.dropZoneSubtitle: .xlsx, .pdf, or photos (JPG/PNG/HEIC) — anything else is skipped

customerPreview.description: Nothing is saved until you confirm.
customerPreview.cacheWarmedTitle: The column layout for this file was learned. Future uploads of the same format will skip AI entirely.
customerPreview.cacheWarmedLabel: Next upload of this format will be instant
customerPreview.sameAsLastImport: These are the exact same bytes you already imported for this customer this week. Re-uploading anyway — review and confirm to replace the existing rows, or cancel to leave them as-is.
customerPreview.truncatedChunks_one: Heads up: this file was split into parts for the AI, and {{count}} part timed out and was skipped. The preview shows the rows that came through — review carefully, then either confirm what's here or re-upload the file split into smaller parts.
customerPreview.truncatedChunks_other: Heads up: this file was split into parts for the AI, and {{count}} parts timed out and were skipped. The preview shows the rows that came through — review carefully, then either confirm what's here or re-upload the file split into smaller parts.
customerPreview.truncated: Heads up: this file was too large for the AI to read in one pass, so even after auto-splitting, some rows may be missing from the preview below. Review carefully — if the row count looks low, re-upload the file split into smaller parts.
customerPreview.replaceWarning_one: Confirming will replace {{existing}} existing punch for {{customer}} in this week with {{included}} new rows from this file. Manual, edited, and locked driver-week rows are preserved (and are not counted in the replacement total).
customerPreview.replaceWarning_other: Confirming will replace {{existing}} existing punches for {{customer}} in this week with {{included}} new rows from this file. Manual, edited, and locked driver-week rows are preserved (and are not counted in the replacement total).
customerPreview.willImport_one: Will import {{count}} punch. No existing {{customer}} rows for this week will change.
customerPreview.willImport_other: Will import {{count}} punches. No existing {{customer}} rows for this week will change.
customerPreview.unmappedHeadline_one: {{count}} badge in this file doesn't match any KFI driver. Pick the matching driver below and we'll remember the mapping so future uploads import automatically. Leave any row as Skip — leave dropped to keep the rows dropped.
customerPreview.unmappedHeadline_other: {{count}} badges in this file don't match any KFI driver. Pick the matching driver below and we'll remember the mapping so future uploads import automatically. Leave any row as Skip — leave dropped to keep the rows dropped.
customerPreview.notADriver: Not a driver — never import for {{customer}}
customerPreview.noDriversLoaded: No drivers loaded — refresh Connecteam first
customerPreview.willSaveMappings_one: Will save {{count}} mapping on confirm and re-import the previously-dropped rows.
customerPreview.willSaveMappings_other: Will save {{count}} mappings on confirm and re-import the previously-dropped rows.
customerPreview.willRememberIgnored_one: Will remember {{count}} id as "not a driver" for {{customer}} — future uploads will skip it silently. Undo from /admin/driver-id-aliases.
customerPreview.willRememberIgnored_other: Will remember {{count}} ids as "not a driver" for {{customer}} — future uploads will skip them silently. Undo from /admin/driver-id-aliases.
customerPreview.noPickYet_one: {{count}} id has no pick yet — pick a driver or choose Skip.
customerPreview.noPickYet_other: {{count}} ids have no pick yet — pick a driver or choose Skip.
customerPreview.autoIgnored_one: Silently dropped {{count}} id previously marked "not a driver" for {{customer}}: {{ids}}. Manage from /admin/driver-id-aliases.
customerPreview.autoIgnored_other: Silently dropped {{count}} ids previously marked "not a driver" for {{customer}}: {{ids}}. Manage from /admin/driver-id-aliases.
customerPreview.importedUnknownDesc: Imported {{count}} punches. These IDs aren't in the KFI roster, so their rows were skipped: {{ids}}.

newCustomer.dialogDescription: For one-off customer files we don't have a parser for. Nothing is saved until you confirm.
newCustomer.customerHelp: This name will be saved as the customer for every imported punch.
newCustomer.fileLabel: File (.pdf, .xlsx, or a photo of the timesheet)
newCustomer.driverMappingDesc: Each name on the document is matched to a Connecteam driver. Leave as "Skip" to drop that driver's rows.
newCustomer.extractedRowsDesc: Untick "Keep" to drop a row. Rows whose driver is unmapped are also skipped automatically.
newCustomer.truncatedChunks_one: Heads up: this file was split into parts for the AI, and {{count}} part timed out and was skipped. The preview shows the rows that came through — review carefully, then either confirm what's here or re-upload the file split into smaller parts.
newCustomer.truncatedChunks_other: Heads up: this file was split into parts for the AI, and {{count}} parts timed out and were skipped. The preview shows the rows that came through — review carefully, then either confirm what's here or re-upload the file split into smaller parts.
newCustomer.truncated: Heads up: this file was too large for the AI to read in one pass, so even after auto-splitting, some rows may be missing from the preview below. Review carefully — if the row count looks low, re-upload the file split into smaller parts.
newCustomer.mappingForgottenDesc: Will ask again next time "{{name}}" appears on a {{customer}} file.
